question: You mentioned two other men walked the 19 days with you. Do you remember their names, where they came from, or what happened to them later?
answer: Yes, one of them was my younger brother, Diler, and the other one was one of the Peshmerga who came with a letter from the leadership asking me where to go. It was also to prove he was trustworthy, that he was the right person. So, me and my brother Diler left with him.
